title: Vietnam Budget Explorer
description: Experience the best of northern Vietnam without breaking the bank. This budget-friendly itinerary covers Hanoi's iconic Old Quarter, a day cruise on the mystical Halong Bay, and the serene landscapes of Ninh Binh. Perfect for solo travellers and backpackers seeking authentic Vietnamese culture at an affordable price.
inclusions: 4 nights accommodation in budget guesthouses/hostels (twin sharing)
Daily breakfast at hotel
Halong Bay shared day cruise with lunch included
All airport and inter-city transfers by shared coach
Hanoi Old Quarter walking tour with local guide

days.title: Arrival in Hanoi – Old Quarter Discovery
days.image: Hanoi Old Quarter narrow streets lanterns evening glow
activities: Arrive at Noi Bai International Airport; shared transfer to Old Quarter hotel (check-in by 2 PM)
Afternoon stroll around Hoan Kiem Lake and visit Ngoc Son Temple on the iconic red Huc Bridge
Evening street food walk in the Old Quarter – try Bun Cha, Banh Mi, and Bia Hoi corner

days.title: Halong Bay Day Cruise
days.image: Halong Bay limestone karsts emerald water morning mist
activities: 7:30 AM: Depart by shared bus to Halong Bay pier (3.5-hour drive); board shared day cruise by 12 PM
Afternoon: Explore Sung Sot (Surprise) Cave, optional kayaking through limestone arches (extra charge)
5 PM: Return to Hanoi; light dinner at a local Old Quarter restaurant

days.title: Hanoi City Highlights
days.image: Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum grand colonial facade morning ceremony
activities: Morning: Visit Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum complex and the One Pillar Pagoda (open 7 AM–11 AM)
Midday: Explore the Temple of Literature – Vietnam's first university built in 1070; lunch at a local pho shop
Afternoon: Browse the Vietnamese Women's Museum and relax at Truc Bach Lake before a leisurely evening

days.title: Ninh Binh – The Inland Halong Bay
days.image: Ninh Binh Trang An river boats karst mountains lush green
activities: 8 AM: Shared bus to Ninh Binh (2 hours); arrive and check in to guesthouse
Morning: Boat trip through Trang An Geopark – row through cave tunnels and rice paddies (UNESCO site)
Afternoon: Cycle to Bich Dong Pagoda and climb to Mua Cave peak for panoramic valley views; dinner of local goat meat (de nuong) in Ninh Binh town

days.title: Ninh Binh to Hanoi – Departure
days.image: Bai Dinh Pagoda golden Buddha statues corridor sunrise
activities: Morning: Visit Bai Dinh Pagoda – Vietnam's largest Buddhist complex with over 500 Arhat statues
11 AM: Transfer back to Hanoi by shared coach
Afternoon: Last-minute souvenir shopping at Dong Xuan Market; transfer to airport for departure flight

title: Vietnam Family Adventure
description: A perfectly paced family holiday blending Vietnam's top highlights with kid-friendly activities. From Hanoi's cultural landmarks to a family overnight cruise on Halong Bay and the charming lantern-lit streets of Hoi An, every day is designed to delight both children and adults. Comfortable hotel stays and private transfers ensure a stress-free experience.
inclusions: 5 nights accommodation in 3-star family rooms (2 adults + 2 children)
Daily breakfast and 3 dinners at recommended family restaurants
Private airport and inter-city transfers by air-conditioned vehicle
Halong Bay overnight cruise (standard cabin, all meals included)
Hoi An lantern-making workshop and bicycle rental for family
exclusions: Vietnam e-visa fees for all family members
Lunches on days not specified and personal expenses
Travel insurance and tips for guides/drivers

days.title: Arrival in Hanoi – Family Check-In
days.image: Hanoi Hoan Kiem Lake red bridge Ngoc Son Temple family afternoon
activities: Arrive at Noi Bai Airport; private transfer to family hotel in the Old Quarter
Late afternoon: Walk around Hoan Kiem Lake – kids can feed turtles and enjoy lakeside ice cream
Evening: Enjoy a Vietnamese water puppet show at Thang Long Theatre (perfect for all ages)

days.title: Hanoi to Halong Bay – Overnight Cruise
days.image: Halong Bay overnight cruise junk boat golden sunset family deck
activities: 8 AM: Private transfer to Halong Bay pier; board family-friendly junk boat by noon with welcome lunch
Afternoon: Explore Thien Cung Cave (Heavenly Palace Cave) by guided walk; squid fishing off the boat deck at dusk
Evening: Seafood dinner on deck under the stars; overnight in standard cruise cabin

days.title: Halong Bay – Kayaking & Return to Hanoi
days.image: Halong Bay kayaking limestone caves clear water family paddling
activities: Early morning: Tai Chi session on the boat deck at sunrise over the karsts
Morning: Family kayaking through hidden lagoons and mangrove caves; visit a floating fishing village
Afternoon: Return to Hanoi by private bus; evening free for shopping at Dong Xuan Market

days.title: Fly to Hoi An – Ancient Town Exploration
days.image: Hoi An Ancient Town yellow buildings lanterns river reflection evening
activities: Morning: Domestic flight Hanoi to Da Nang; private transfer to Hoi An hotel (30 minutes)
Afternoon: Explore Hoi An Ancient Town – visit the iconic Japanese Covered Bridge and colourful merchant houses
Evening: Families release colourful lanterns on the Thu Bon River; dinner at a riverside restaurant

days.title: Hoi An – Cooking Class & Lantern Workshop
days.image: Hoi An morning market fresh herbs cooking class family fun
activities: Morning: Join a family Vietnamese cooking class – visit the local market and cook Cao Lau and White Rose dumplings
Afternoon: Participate in a lantern-making workshop; cycle around the rice fields on the outskirts of Hoi An
Evening: Leisure time to browse tailor shops and enjoy a farewell dinner in the Ancient Town

days.title: Da Nang – Departure
days.image: Da Nang Dragon Bridge sunrise coastal cityscape family
activities: Morning: Visit the Golden Bridge (Ba Na Hills cable car access) – the famous bridge held by giant stone hands
Midday: Transfer to Da Nang International Airport for departure flight
Optional: Stop at My Khe Beach for a final dip before the airport transfer

title: Vietnam Romantic Escape
description: Fall in love with Vietnam on this curated honeymoon journey designed for couples. Begin with romantic evenings in Hanoi's Old Quarter, move to a premium Halong Bay overnight cruise with private balcony cabins, and finish with candlelit dinners by the Thu Bon River in enchanting Hoi An. Every detail is crafted for intimacy and discovery.
inclusions: 5 nights accommodation in boutique hotels and romantic resorts (couple rooms with décor)
Daily breakfast in bed and 2 candlelit dinners at top-rated restaurants
Premium Halong Bay 2-night cruise with private balcony cabin
Private air-conditioned transfers throughout the trip
Romantic sunset boat ride on Thu Bon River with flower arrangement
exclusions: Spa treatments and optional excursions beyond the itinerary

days.title: Arrival in Hanoi – Old Quarter Romance
days.image: Hanoi Old Quarter rooftop cafe couple evening city lights
activities: Arrive at Noi Bai Airport; private transfer to boutique hotel in Hanoi's French Quarter
Afternoon: Leisurely walk around Hoan Kiem Lake; visit Ngoc Son Temple and photograph the iconic red bridge at golden hour
Evening: Romantic dinner at a rooftop restaurant overlooking the Old Quarter with live traditional music

days.title: Hanoi to Halong Bay – Premium Cruise Begins
days.image: Halong Bay luxury junk boat couple private balcony limestone karsts
activities: 9 AM: Private transfer to Halong Bay; board premium junk boat with welcome champagne and floral cabin décor
Afternoon: Couples kayaking through pristine Hidden Lagoon and explore a bat cave by torchlight
Sunset: Private sundeck cocktails with panoramic karst views; romantic seafood dinner on board

days.title: Halong Bay – Sunrise & Sailing
days.image: Halong Bay sunrise golden mist limestone islands couple on deck
activities: 6 AM: Watch sunrise together from the private cabin balcony over the misty karsts
Morning: Visit Vung Vieng Floating Village; optional cooking class on board with the chef
Afternoon: Return cruise to the pier; private transfer to Hanoi for overnight flight or continue journey

days.title: Fly to Hoi An – Ancient Town Magic
days.image: Hoi An Ancient Town lanterns silk dresses couple walking cobblestone
activities: Morning flight from Hanoi to Da Nang; private transfer to a riverside boutique hotel in Hoi An
Afternoon: Explore Hoi An Ancient Town hand-in-hand – visit the Japanese Bridge and art galleries on Nguyen Thai Hoc Street
Evening: Release floating lanterns on the Thu Bon River at dusk; candlelit riverside dinner

days.title: Hoi An – Spa Day & Sunset Beach
days.image: Hoi An An Bang Beach couple sunset waves golden sand
activities: Morning: Indulge in a couples' traditional Vietnamese herbal spa massage at a boutique spa
Afternoon: Private driver to An Bang Beach – relax on pristine sands with a book and chilled coconut water
Evening: Farewell dinner at the Deck restaurant with views over the rice paddies; optional cycle through villages

days.title: Da Nang – Departure
days.image: Da Nang My Khe Beach sunrise couple walking shoreline
activities: Morning: Stroll along My Khe Beach at sunrise – one of the most beautiful beaches in Asia
Late morning: Visit the Marble Mountains – a cluster of five marble and limestone hills with Buddhist caves
Afternoon: Transfer to Da Nang Airport for departure flight home

title: Vietnam Adventure Trail
description: Push your limits on this action-packed Vietnam adventure combining Sapa's misty mountain treks, Halong Bay kayaking, and the legendary Cu Chi Tunnels. Trek through terraced rice fields to remote hill tribe villages, paddle through limestone sea caves, and crawl through wartime underground networks. Vietnam's wild side awaits the bold traveller.
inclusions: 5 nights accommodation in trekking lodges and mid-range hotels
Daily breakfast and packed lunch on trekking days
Sapa 2-day/1-night village trek with certified local guide
Halong Bay adventure kayaking day trip with gear provided
Cu Chi Tunnels guided tour including tunnel crawl experience
exclusions: Personal trekking gear beyond basic provisions

days.title: Arrival in Hanoi – Adventure Briefing
days.image: Hanoi night street food stalls backpacker area buzzing energy
activities: Arrive at Noi Bai Airport; transfer to Hanoi guesthouse near the Old Quarter
Evening: Gear check and adventure briefing with tour guide at the hostel
Night: Explore Bia Hoi Junction – grab a street beer and meet fellow travellers

days.title: Overnight Train to Sapa – Mountain Trekking Begins
days.image: Sapa rice terraces fog morning hill tribe village Muong Hoa Valley
activities: 8 AM: Hanoi city half-day tour (Temple of Literature, Hoan Kiem Lake); afternoon free for preparation
9 PM: Board overnight train from Hanoi to Lao Cai (Sapa gateway) – hard sleeper berth
Arrive Lao Cai at 6 AM next morning for transfer to Sapa town

days.title: Sapa – Village Trek & Home Stay
days.image: Sapa Muong Hoa Valley terraced rice paddies green golden season trekker path
activities: 8 AM: Trek from Sapa town through Muong Hoa Valley – visit Cat Cat and Y Linh Ho Hmong villages (12 km route)
Midday: Packed lunch in a rice field with views of Fansipan peak on clear days
Evening: Overnight homestay in a Black Hmong family house; traditional dinner and cultural exchange

days.title: Sapa to Hanoi – Halong Bay Prep
days.image: Sapa Ta Van village bamboo bridge river lush valley morning
activities: Morning: Trek to Ta Van Giay village; visit local market and observe traditional weaving techniques
Afternoon: Transfer back to Lao Cai; return train or bus to Hanoi
Evening: Rest in Hanoi; gear prep for the next day's Halong Bay kayaking adventure

days.title: Halong Bay – Sea Kayaking & Cave Exploration
days.image: Halong Bay sea kayak paddling through dark cave arch turquoise water
activities: 6 AM: Early bus from Hanoi to Halong Bay pier; join adventure kayaking group
Full day: Kayak through Dark Cave (Hang Toi), Hidden Lagoon, and around the floating Cua Van fishing village
Late afternoon: Return to Hanoi; debrief dinner at a local restaurant with fellow adventurers

days.title: Ho Chi Minh City – Cu Chi Tunnels & Departure
days.image: Cu Chi Tunnels wartime underground network jungle entrance Vietnam
activities: Morning flight Hanoi to Ho Chi Minh City; transfer to Cu Chi Tunnels (70 km northwest)
Afternoon: Guided Cu Chi Tunnels tour – crawl through 100m of wartime tunnels, see booby traps and wartime exhibits
Evening: Explore Ben Thanh Market; transfer to Tan Son Nhat Airport for departure

title: Vietnam Luxury Odyssey
description: Indulge in Vietnam's finest experiences across five iconic destinations. Stay at 5-star resorts and boutique hotels, cruise Halong Bay on a luxury superjacht with gourmet meals, dine at award-winning restaurants in Hoi An, and explore imperial Hue with a private historian. This is Vietnam at its most opulent and immersive.
inclusions: 6 nights in 5-star hotels and luxury boutique properties (suite or superior rooms)
All breakfasts, 3 fine-dining lunches, and 4 gourmet dinners included
Halong Bay 2-night luxury cruise (en-suite cabin with private balcony, butler service)
Private air-conditioned car and guide throughout; domestic flights included
Exclusive imperial Hue tour with private historian and royal court lunch
exclusions: Spa treatments, personal expenses, and premium alcohol

days.title: Arrival in Hanoi – French Quarter Elegance
days.image: Hanoi Sofitel Metropole Hotel elegant French colonial lobby evening
activities: VIP arrival transfer to a 5-star French Quarter hotel (e.g., Sofitel Metropole Hanoi)
Afternoon: Private guided tour of Hoan Kiem Lake, Ngoc Son Temple, and colonial architecture with a heritage expert
Evening: Welcome dinner at a top-rated Vietnamese fine dining restaurant with paired wine menu

days.title: Hanoi Culture – Ho Chi Minh & Temple of Literature
days.image: Temple of Literature Hanoi scholar courtyard ancient architecture serene
activities: Morning: Private guided tour of Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, Presidential Palace, and the One Pillar Pagoda
Midday: Lunch at Press Club Hanoi – a landmark fine dining institution
Afternoon: Tour the Temple of Literature and Vietnam Museum of Ethnology; evening cocktails at a rooftop bar

days.title: Halong Bay – Luxury Cruise Embarkation
days.image: Halong Bay luxury superjacht private deck couple champagne karst panorama
activities: Morning: Private car to Tuan Chau Marina; board premium luxury cruise with welcome champagne reception
Afternoon: Private chartered kayaking and snorkelling; visit a secluded deserted beach exclusive to cruise guests
Evening: 5-course gourmet dinner with fresh seafood; stargazing from the sun deck

days.title: Halong Bay to Hue – Imperial City
days.image: Hue Imperial Citadel moat walls golden gate ancient Vietnam dynasty
activities: Morning: Sunrise yoga on the cruise deck; breakfast before disembarkation
Afternoon flight from Hanoi to Hue; private transfer to a colonial boutique hotel on the Perfume River
Evening: Sunset boat cruise on the Perfume River to Thien Mu Pagoda; dinner featuring Hue royal cuisine

days.title: Hue – Imperial Citadel & Royal Tombs
days.image: Hue Minh Mang Royal Tomb stone elephants lotus pond misty morning
activities: Morning: Exclusive private tour of Hue Imperial Citadel with a royal court historian; visit the Forbidden Purple City
Midday: Royal Hue lunch experience served in traditional style with 8 dishes
Afternoon: Visit the magnificent tombs of Emperor Minh Mang and Tu Duc; evening free in Hue town

days.title: Hoi An – Artisan Town & Culinary Delights
days.image: Hoi An Ancient Town silk lanterns night market reflections Thu Bon river
activities: Morning: Private transfer to Hoi An (3 hours via Hai Van Pass coastal route with photo stops)
Afternoon: Exclusive tailoring consultation on Tran Phu Street; tour silk and lacquerware workshops with a local artisan
Evening: Private cooking class with a Michelin-recommended chef; dinner at The Deck restaurant by the river

days.title: Ho Chi Minh City – Farewell in Style
days.image: Ho Chi Minh City Reunification Palace grand courtyard city skyline dusk
activities: Morning flight from Da Nang to Ho Chi Minh City; check in to 5-star hotel in District 1
Afternoon: Private city tour – Reunification Palace, Notre Dame Cathedral, Central Post Office, and Ben Thanh Market
Evening: Farewell dinner at Chill Skybar or Noir restaurant; departure transfer to Tan Son Nhat Airport

title: Vietnam Cultural Immersion
description: Journey through three millennia of Vietnamese civilisation on this culturally rich itinerary. Trace imperial history in Hue's walled citadel, uncover UNESCO-listed Hoi An's merchant heritage, and absorb the soul of the nation at Hanoi's temples and museums. Guided by local historians, every monument comes alive with stories of dynasty, war, and resilience.
inclusions: 4 nights in cultural heritage hotels (centrally located, 3-4 star)
Daily breakfast and 2 traditional Vietnamese cultural lunches
Expert English-speaking cultural historian guide for all tours
All entrance fees to monuments, citadels, museums, and pagodas
Private air-conditioned transfers between cities and airports
exclusions: Personal expenses, dinners (except specified), and tips

days.title: Hanoi – Cradle of Vietnamese Civilisation
days.image: Hanoi Temple of Literature scholars courtyard ancient stone stelae
activities: Arrive at Noi Bai Airport; private transfer to Old Quarter heritage hotel
Afternoon: Guided tour of Temple of Literature (Van Mieu) – Vietnam's first imperial academy dating to 1070
Evening: Visit Hoa Lo Prison Museum (the 'Hanoi Hilton'); night walk through the Old Quarter's 36 guild streets

days.title: Hanoi – Pagodas, Mausoleum & Ethnic Museum
days.image: Hanoi Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum solemn morning guard ceremony Ba Dinh Square
activities: 7 AM: Visit Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum (open mornings only) and One Pillar Pagoda
Midday: Vietnam Museum of Ethnology – exhibits on 54 ethnic minority groups; traditional cultural lunch
Afternoon: Visit the Fine Arts Museum; evening water puppet performance at Thang Long Theatre

days.title: Fly to Hue – Imperial Capital Exploration
days.image: Hue Imperial Citadel Ngo Mon Gate royal red walls moat reflection
activities: Morning flight Hanoi to Hue; private transfer to hotel near the Perfume River
Afternoon: Comprehensive tour of Hue Imperial Citadel – Thai Hoa Palace, Mieu Temple, and the Nine Dynastic Urns
Evening: Attend a traditional Nha Nhac royal court music performance (UNESCO Intangible Heritage)

days.title: Hue Tombs & Drive to Hoi An
days.image: Hue Khai Dinh Tomb mosaic facade stone dragons grand mountain setting
activities: Morning: Visit the elaborately decorated Khai Dinh Tomb and the serene Tu Duc Tomb set among pine forests
Midday: Drive to Hoi An via the scenic Hai Van Pass coastal road (2.5 hours) with photo stops
Afternoon: Arrive Hoi An; guided walk through the Ancient Town – Japanese Bridge, Phuc Kien Assembly Hall, and silk shops

days.title: Hoi An – Craftsmanship & Departure
days.image: Hoi An Tan Ky ancient merchant house interior carved wood lanterns daylight
activities: Morning: Visit Tan Ky Ancient House and the Hoi An Museum of History and Culture
Late morning: Attend a lantern-making or silk-weaving craft workshop with a local artisan family
Afternoon: Transfer to Da Nang International Airport for departure flight

title: Vietnam Weekend Escape – Hanoi & Halong
description: Short on time but big on experience – this compact itinerary hits Vietnam's most iconic highlights in just four days. Explore Hanoi's charming Old Quarter and temples before setting sail on the magical waters of Halong Bay. Ideal for long-weekend travellers who want maximum impact with minimal days off work.
inclusions: 3 nights accommodation (2 in Hanoi Old Quarter hotel, 1 overnight on Halong cruise)
Daily breakfast and all meals during the Halong cruise
Halong Bay overnight cruise with cabin, all meals, kayaking, and cave tour
All transfers by private car (airport–hotel–pier–airport)
Hanoi highlights half-day guided city tour
exclusions: Personal expenses, optional activities, and tips

days.title: Arrival in Hanoi – First Impressions
days.image: Hanoi Hoan Kiem Lake early morning tai chi locals peaceful
activities: Arrive at Noi Bai Airport; private transfer to Old Quarter hotel (check-in from 2 PM)
Afternoon: Walk Hoan Kiem Lake; explore Ngoc Son Temple and the vibrant 36-street Old Quarter neighbourhood
Evening: Street food tour – Bun Bo Nam Bo, Banh Cuon, and the famous Egg Coffee at Cafe Giang

days.title: Hanoi City Tour & Halong Bay Embarkation
days.image: Halong Bay junk boat sailing limestone karsts blue sky afternoon
activities: Morning: City tour – Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, One Pillar Pagoda, Temple of Literature, and the Hoa Lo Prison
12 PM: Private transfer to Halong Bay pier (3.5 hours); board overnight cruise with welcome lunch
Afternoon: Explore Dau Go Cave; sunset cocktails on deck; seafood dinner and overnight in cruise cabin

days.title: Halong Bay – Kayak, Cave & Return
days.image: Halong Bay kayaking hidden lagoon emerald water narrow passage morning
activities: 6:30 AM: Sunrise on the top deck; Tai Chi session over the mist-covered bay
Morning: Kayaking through dark mangrove caves and around floating fishing villages
1 PM: Return to pier by boat; private car back to Hanoi; evening free to explore Dong Xuan Market

days.title: Hanoi – Last Morning & Departure
days.image: Hanoi West Lake Tran Quoc Pagoda lotus pink morning reflection
activities: Morning: Peaceful walk to West Lake and visit Tran Quoc Pagoda – Hanoi's oldest Buddhist temple
Late morning: Last café stop in the French Quarter; final souvenir shopping on Hang Gai silk street
Transfer to Noi Bai International Airport for departure
